meta.title: How Hireeo works
meta.description: Hireeo is a coordination layer between you and the professionals who fix, install, paint and move. The step-by-step.

hero.subtitle: Hireeo is a coordination layer between you and the professionals who fix, install, paint and move. The step-by-step.

steps.title: Tell us what you need
steps.desc: In natural language — as you'd tell a friend. e.g.: "the bathroom pipe broke, La Reina area, today if possible".
steps.meta: No forms. AI detects category, area and urgency.

steps.title: Get three proposals
steps.desc: We curate pros by reputation, availability and proximity. Each one brings photo, real rating and reference price.

steps.title: Agree and resolve
steps.desc: Chat directly with the pro, confirm price and schedule. Pay with your local gateway. Rate when done.
steps.meta: MercadoPago in CL/AR/UY · Stripe in ES/US.

faq.title: Before you start.
items: No. Hireeo never touches the job's money. Payment goes directly to the pro via local gateway.
We validate official ID, references and background. The badge appears next to the profile.
Does it work in my country?
Yes in Chile, Argentina, Uruguay, Spain and United States. Coming soon: Peru and Colombia.
What if no one shows up?
Your request stays visible to all pros in the area for 24h. If no match, we notify you and close it.
How do I rate a service?
When the job closes you get an email with the rating link. Photo of completed job required.
